---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: wcabril
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem it Solves

What problem or limitation does this address? (e.g. "Currently I have to manually...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or any other context that helps explain the request.
